name: sim_weyl_triple_a2_bc2_g2_coexistence
scope_note: Triple coexistence probe: W(A2) + W(B2) + W(G2) simultaneously. A2 ⊂ G2: all 6 A2 roots appear as the 6 short G2 roots; W(A2) <= W(G2). B2 is NOT a sub-root-system of G2: no B2 roots appear in G2 root set. A21 ladder: -1(A2), -2(B2), -3(G2) — clean distinct ordering. Triple non-commutativity: 3-way composition gives new structure. Emergence: triple union covers more angles than any pair. z3 UNSAT: |alpha|^2=1 AND |alpha|^2=3 simultaneously.

pytorch.reason: Represent all A2(6), B2(8), G2(12) roots as 2D float64 tensors; verify A2 roots are subset of G2 roots; check B2 roots have no overlap with G2; compute triple non-commutativity ||s_A2(s_B2(s_G2(v))) - s_G2(s_B2(s_A2(v)))||; measure angular coverage of union of all three root systems

pyg.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

z3.reason: UNSAT: |alpha|^2=1 (A2-length) AND |alpha|^2=1 (B2-short-length) AND |alpha|^2=3 (G2-long-length) simultaneously; also UNSAT: W(A2) order AND W(B2) order AND W(G2) order all equal

cvc5.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

sympy.reason: Symbolic verification A2 Cartan [[2,-1],[-1,2]] is submatrix of G2 [[2,-1],[-3,2]]; verify A2 simple roots are G2 short roots; check B2 Cartan [[2,-1],[-2,2]] has no common submatrix structure with G2; combined rank of A2+B2+G2 simple roots in R^2

clifford.reason: Triple Clifford composition: s_A2(s_B2(s_G2(v))); verify the composed map is NOT equal to s_G2(s_B2(s_A2(v))); confirm A2 Clifford reflections are a sub-algebra of G2 Clifford reflections (A2 ⊂ G2 structure in Clifford algebra)

geomstats.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

e3nn.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

rustworkx.reason: Triple Cayley graph: A2(6 nodes) + B2(8 nodes) + G2(12 nodes) subgraphs; A2 nodes are a SUBSET of G2 nodes (A2 <= G2); B2 nodes are DISJOINT from G2; inter-group edges record which cross-shell reflections commute vs don't

xgi.reason: 3-way hyperedge {W(A2), W(B2), W(G2)} encoding their simultaneous coexistence; sub-hyperedge {A2, G2, nested} encoding A2 ⊂ G2; hyperedge {B2, G2, disjoint} encoding B2 is not nested in G2

toponetx.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

gudhi.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

P1_pytorch_all_three_orders_distinct.reason: |W(A2)|=6, |W(B2)|=8, |W(G2)|=12: all three are mutually distinct Weyl group orders

P2_pytorch_root_system_counts.reason: A2 has 6 roots, B2 has 8 roots, G2 has 12 roots: all root system sizes confirmed

P3_pytorch_a2_roots_subset_of_g2.reason: A2 root system is a sub-root-system of G2: all 6 A2 roots appear in G2 as the 6 short roots

P4_pytorch_b2_mostly_outside_g2.reason: B2 has 6 roots outside G2 (only +-e1 are shared); B2 long roots +-e2 and +-{e1+-e2} are NOT G2 roots; B2 is NOT a sub-root-system of G2

P5_pytorch_a2_generators_in_g2.reason: W(A2) generators s1 and s2 are BOTH elements of W(G2): W(A2) is a subgroup of W(G2)

P6_pytorch_b2_generator_not_in_g2.reason: W(B2) generator sB2 is NOT in W(G2): B2 is not a sub-Weyl-group of G2; incompatible geometries

P7_pytorch_triple_noncommutativity.generators: A2:s1(e1 reflection), B2:sb2(-e1+e2 reflection), G2:s1@s2(60-deg rotation)
P7_pytorch_triple_noncommutativity.reason: s_A2(s_B2(G2_rot(v))) != G2_rot(s_B2(s_A2(v))): triple three-way non-commutative structure

P8_pytorch_triple_union_coverage.reason: Each additional root system extends angular coverage: A2 < A2+B2 <= A2+B2+G2

P9_sympy_a2_g2_cartan_relationship.reason: A2 and G2 Cartan share same row1 and diagonal; differ only in A21 (-1 vs -3): A2 is 'less constrained' G2

P10_clifford_a2_s1_matches_g2_s1.reason: A2 s1 and G2 s1 share alpha1=(1,0): their Clifford reflections of same vector are identical (A2 ⊂ G2)

P11_rustworkx_triple_cayley_structure.reason: Triple graph: 12 G2 nodes + 8 B2 extra nodes = 20 total; A2 nodes are subset of G2 nodes

P12_xgi_triple_coexistence_hyperedges.reason: XGI: triple coexistence, A2⊂G2 nesting, B2 disjoint from G2, triple root union

N1_z3_unsat_all_orders_equal.reason: UNSAT: |W(A2)|=6 AND |W(B2)|=8 AND |W(G2)|=12 AND all equal: triple equality is impossible

N2_z3_unsat_a2_length_and_g2_long_length.reason: UNSAT: |alpha|^2=1 (A2-length) AND |alpha|^2=3 (G2-long-length): same vector can't have two norms

N3_pytorch_b2_not_subgroup_of_g2.reason: W(B2) generator sB2 is absent from W(G2): B2 is NOT a subgroup of G2 (incompatible Coxeter structure)

N4_pytorch_b2_long_root_not_in_g2.reason: B2 long root beta2=(-1,1) is NOT in the G2 root system: B2 geometry is incompatible with G2

N5_pytorch_triple_union_larger_than_pair.reason: Triple union is larger than any pairwise union: new roots emerge only when all three are active

N6_sympy_a21_ladder_all_distinct.reason: A21 values form a clean ladder: -1(A2), -2(B2), -3(G2); all distinct; no two groups share A21

N7_clifford_triple_composition_not_ident.reason: Triple reflection composition s_A2 ∘ s_B2 ∘ s_G2 is NOT identity: no accidental cancellation

N8_rustworkx_all_three_graphs_distinct.reason: All three Cayley graphs have distinct node counts (6, 8, 12): mutually non-isomorphic

B1_pytorch_identity_shared_by_all_three.reason: Identity element commutes with all generators from W(A2), W(B2), W(G2): universal fixed point

B2_pytorch_zero_fixed_by_all_three.reason: Zero vector is fixed by all reflections from all three groups: degenerate triple boundary

B3_pytorch_shared_e1_reflection_all_thre.reason: All three groups share s_e1 (alpha1=beta1=gamma1=e1): universal A1=Z2 subgroup

B4_sympy_all_three_share_cartan_skeleton.reason: All three Cartan matrices have same first row [2,-1] and same diagonal 2: shared skeleton structure

B5_z3_sat_a2_length_equals_g2_short_leng.reason: SAT: A2 root length and G2 short root length are both 1 — A2 ⊂ G2 is consistent at the length boundary

B6_clifford_a2_alpha2_equals_g2_short_ro.reason: A2 alpha2 = G2 short root: their Clifford reflections are identical; A2 ⊂ G2 confirmed at boundary

B7_xgi_triple_boundary_structure.reason: XGI: A2⊂G2 nesting boundary; B2 disjoint from G2; shared A1 and origin across all three
